ops.title: ccx web outline/read/search shipped 2026-07-08 — architecture, live-verified facts, and what remains unverified
ops.body:
`ccx web` (outline/read/search) shipped 2026-07-08: in-process engine in internal/web (OpEdit-style dispatch special-case, NOT a router backend), fetch cascade jina→exa→firecrawl→plainHTTP→browserbase, heading-tree chunking (768-token len/4 ceiling), hybrid BM25 + potion-base-8M embeddings via `uv run --with model2vec` subprocess (warm ≈0.54 s), gzipped-JSON page cache with 24h TTL, `§2.3#hash` cites (anchor.Of Crockford base32, NOT base36), guards in plugin/hooks/web_guards.py.

Live-verified: **keyless jina returns 401 in production** (the "keyless 20 RPM tier" is dead — cascade falls to plain HTTP, logged at Debug); PerimeterX/DataDome sensor scripts appear on normally-served 200 pages, so raw-HTML challenge detection needs the TIGHT marker set (challenge-page strings only), loose markers ("_px", "datadome") are safe only on cleaned markdown tiers.

Unverified live (no API keys at smoke time): exa `includeHtmlTags` response shape, firecrawl v2 envelope details, browserbase `/v1/fetch` (and whether it needs BROWSERBASE_PROJECT_ID). Check on first keyed run.

Related: [[cc-context-architecture]], [[ccx-exec-monty-notarization]] (the embed driver mirrors that subprocess pattern).
